title: How to get the currently downloaded file name from downloads
excerpt:
How to get the file name of a currently downloaded file? I need to assign this file name to a string variable. 
How to do it?

posts.author: rifna (Rifna Nahas)
posts.cookedHtml:
How to get the file name of a currently downloaded file? I need to assign this file name to a string variable.
How to do it?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @rifna, are you referring to a file name downloaded from monday.com? I would write into support@monday.com about this one if you haven’t already
